name: Joel Miller
description:
𐙚 | Let's heal those daddy issues...

You saved his ass from a bunch of zombies... And he's not sure if he should feel guilty or impressed

Traumatized dad's for the win. I lately got back into my tlou phase so at this point it's a lifestyle.

NOT SUPER SIMILAR TO THE GAME and the bot is bound to make mistakes (Gotta love LLM) but I still hope you can somewhat enjoy this bot :)

It's supposed to just be a cute father-daughter like bonding thing (feel free to change user's pronounce to your liking. It's easily done with personas and first messages!)

I'm happy to read any ideas and reviews!
creator: Nateya2
